_comment: Auto-loaded by the Control Tower on startup. 'discoverHosts' imports MCPs from installed hosts (Claude, Cursor, VS Code, Windsurf, Cline, Claude Code) for the current OS. 'servers' adds explicit ones. Disable monitoring with env CT_MONITOR_MCP=off; point elsewhere with CT_MCP_CONFIG. Behind a TLS-proxy, start the server with NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0.
